summary: Money Garden UX Enhancement testing completed. All features verified: 2x2 grid layout, single plot design, growth stages with emojis, Plant Selection Dialog with seed details, Sell Confirmation Dialog with user-friendly text, and whole number calculations. Backend (19/19 tests passed) and frontend UI both working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/garden/farm returns 200 for Grade 1 child
✅ Backend: Farm has plots array with required fields
✅ Backend: Seeds have all required details (cost, growth_days, harvest_yield, base_sell_price)
✅ Backend: Market open status (is_market_open) returned as boolean
✅ Backend: Wallet has investing (Garden Money) account
✅ Backend: Garden transactions endpoint returns list
✅ Frontend: Money Garden page loads for Grade 1 user
✅ Frontend: 2x2 grid layout displays all 4 sections (Garden Money, My Garden, My Shop, The Market)
✅ Frontend: Single large plot display in My Garden section
✅ Frontend: Growth stages indicator shows 4 stages (Seed 🌰, Sprout 🌱, Growing 🌿, Ready! 🌻)
✅ Frontend: Plant button (🌱) disabled when plot occupied, enabled when empty
✅ Frontend: Sell Confirmation Dialog opens with correct content
✅ Frontend: Sell dialog shows user-friendly text format ('X will be sold at ₹Y each')
✅ Frontend: Quantity controls (+/-) working in Sell dialog
✅ Frontend: All monetary values display as whole numbers (₹45, ₹5, ₹10, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Malli helper visible and functional
critical_code_review_comments: Plant Selection Dialog (lines 610-679): Correctly shows Cost, Growth days, Yield and Earnings with Math.round() for whole numbers
Sell Confirmation Dialog (lines 682-744): Shows user-friendly text format '1 Sunflower will be sold at ₹5 each'
getMarketPrice function (lines 249-254): Uses Math.round() for whole number prices
Growth stages indicator (lines 390-420): Shows 4 stages with clear emojis and labels
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_money_garden_ux.py - Created comprehensive test file for Money Garden API
seed_data_creation: Used existing test child with Grade 1, ₹45 in Garden Money, 4 Sunflowers in inventory, and 1 Sunflower plant growing in plot
context_for_next_testing_agent: Money Garden UX enhancements are complete and verified. All 5 requirements met: 1) Growth stages visually obvious with 4 stages and emojis, 2) Single large plot display, 3) Plant Selection Dialog opens from plant button or Market Buy, 4) Seed details shown in dialog (cost, days, yield, earnings), 5) Sell dialog shows 'X will be sold at ₹Y each' format, 6) All calculations use Math.round() for whole numbers. Test user has a Sunflower plant growing at Seed stage (0%).

features_verified.2x2_grid_layout: ✅ Garden Money (top-left), My Garden (top-right), My Shop (bottom-left), The Market (bottom-right)
features_verified.single_plot_design: ✅ One large plot with plant display and action buttons
features_verified.growth_stages: ✅ 4 stages: Seed 🌰 → Sprout 🌱 → Growing 🌿 → Ready! 🌻 with progress bar
features_verified.plant_selection_dialog: ✅ Shows seed name, emoji, cost, growth days, yield, and earnings
features_verified.sell_confirmation_dialog: ✅ Shows 'X [item] will be sold at ₹Y each' with quantity controls
features_verified.whole_numbers: ✅ All monetary values use Math.round() - no decimals in UI
